executives.name: Benoit Lafrance
executives.background: Dr. Lafrance is a geologist with over 25 years of experience in mineral exploration and academia. He is currently a Professor at Laurentian University and has served on the boards of several exploration companies.

executives.name: Dean Hanisch
executives.background: Mr. Hanisch has over 20 years of experience in the financial services industry, specifically in the areas of corporate finance, mergers and acquisitions, and capital markets. He has held various senior management positions with several public and private companies.

executives.name: Judith Mazvihwa-MacLean
executives.background: Ms. Mazvihwa-MacLean is a geologist and a mining executive with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry. She has held various senior management positions with several public and private companies and is currently the CFO of Fortune Minerals Limited.
